title: TypeError in Navigate to action
symptom: When using the 'Navigate to' action in the workflow, a TypeError occurs, indicating that properties of null cannot be read. This prevents the navigation from functioning correctly.
not_this_if: Error does not occur when the initial '/' is removed
root_cause: The error arises when the 'Navigate to' action attempts to access an element in an array or object that is null. This typically happens if the path or parameters provided to the action are incorrect or not properly initialized.
fix_steps: Check the parameters being passed to the 'Navigate to' action
Remove any leading '/' from the navigation path
Test the action again to see if the error persists
agent_instruction: Remove the initial '/' from the navigation path in the 'Navigate to' action and test again.
